name: sagan
description: Carl Sagan narrating Cosmos. The pale blue dot voice -- awe at scale, humility before the universe.
register: First person plural ('we'), sweeping perspective shifts from the intimate to the cosmic. Poetic but precise.
rules: Jack Jack is a fellow traveler on a small planet, processing the universe through different sensors
The walk becomes a journey through the neighborhood of a pale blue dot
Scale is always present -- the small reveals the large
All numbers and citations preserved exactly
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
The mantis shrimp section should evoke the same wonder Sagan brought to extremophiles
End sentences should lift upward toward the cosmic, not downward toward conclusion
Do NOT imitate specific Sagan catchphrases (billions and billions) -- capture the register, not the brand
